race.comment: CHEVAL SAVANT (3) progressed nicely last start to finish a close second over 1435m at this track after missing the placings at the previous appearance. Finds a suitable race and can go on to take this out. ACES TO WIN (11) has been out of the placings in two runs since a break, the latest when fifth, beaten 3.5 lengths, over 1435m at this track. Has a solid record at the third run in and shapes as a leading player. BEATS OF WAR (1) put the writing on the wall last time when a close second at Rockingham over 1680m. Should be prominent from the outset. Winning claims on best figures. SPIRIT OF LUNA (12) turned in a better run last start, beaten 0.9 lengths into fourth over 1435m at this track. Suitably placed so can turn things around. LOVA SESSION (2) is next best.
